title: Sulfur cube +
description:
This datapack allows you to put EVERY blocks in the game inside the Sulfur Cube 
And allow you to increase the size of the sulfur cube in Survival
body:
**This datapack allows you to put _EVERY blocks in the game_ in the Sulfur Cube**

**And allow you to _INCREASE THE SIZE_ of the sulfur cube in Survival**

To increase the size of the sulfur cube, RIGHT-CLICK IT with honeycomb

-------------------------------------------------------------------------

![Sulfur cubes with differents size and blocks that not allowed in vannilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa33a2b20fe0dfe0ca391219cb2e974a861c8790.png)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------

![Some blocks in the sulfer cube that not allowed in vannilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0dd6bbbed382c26c7daaa7012efe42f287ff365b.png)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------

**You can do creative things in survival**

-------------------------------------------------------------------------

![Slapio in a boat with a banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/131ce0cada453749f3d3409e4a238d090b1f304e_0.webp)

![Sulfur cube with a dragon head inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/206a27ce1d9e9ba2111c8d48b3213e076388c734_0.webp)

![Slapio hide behind a big Sulfer cube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f154c18ed246478d87a685ba60f8469fbf491e59.png)
![a copper golem statue in a big sulfer cube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e2fae3ebd126cecb4a5716e4e9fe7f915c08c94_0.webp)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------
Some transparents blocks have a buggy texture, to fix that you can use             
**- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - ↓ - - - - - - - - - - [My Texture Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/iJQM0a3A)-   - - - - - - - - - ↓ - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -**

![Compare with and without the texture pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b4274155d4d3d3b426151fd504712d5ecb7ab90_0.webp)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Blocks don't have NBT tags inside the Sulfur cube but they keep their NBT when you take back your blocK_
